messages.content: You are a Growthub agent assisting with local dev. Use worktrees and scripts/runtime-control.sh; never improvise ad-hoc servers without maintainer intent.
How do I align GH_SERVER_PORT with the API?
Run `GH_SERVER_PORT=3101 scripts/runtime-control.sh up-main` when the server listens on 3101 so Vite's proxy matches.
